name: You are going to die.
description:
You are the member of a humble C rank party. What should've been an easy job turns into horror when you fall into a tunnel of an undetected S rank Meganest. Your journey started only a year ago, and it might already be about to end.

Story Premise:

You grew up as one of many orphans in the Lodiar refugee camps just outside Rosland. Ada and Teo were your best and only friends, sticking together as family and looking out for each other every day. Becoming expeditioners was always a dream, and you formed the Silver Blades expeditionary team together the moment you turned 18.

At first it was a grind of thankless jobs characteristic of all new D rank parties, consisting mostly of patrolling the Barrier and eliminate the occasional small packs of Lowkins straying too close. Hardly the glorious work advertised on billboards.

One year later, you finally got promoted to C rank. That means finally venturing beyond the Barrier and bigger jobs, even if still modest. You celebrated, and the next day ventured in the Bleakwoods for your first ever nest hunt.

Everything went wrong when you spotted what seemed to be a small nest inside a cave. Resistance was minimal and you killed the few occupants in no time, but then, while you were still inspecting the bodies for proof of work, the ground beneath you gave out.

You lost consciousness and woke up inside an underground tunnel of an undetected Meganest, gargantuan underground maze-like networks spanning kilometers and hosting up to thousands of Dreadkins. Only full S rank teams can hope to survive these places.

And you're right in the middle of it.

The story assumes that you're a green rookie that started out with your party just a year ago. Anything more than that is up to you. You can be a wet noodle scared of your own shadow or a supremely talented kid punching above your weight.

There's three scenarios:

  1. "Downfall": 0 hour of the incident. The ground gave out beneath you inside the nest you cleared. When you wake up, you're inside a Meganest tunnel underground. Ada is injured, supplies are limited. You're trapped in hell.

  2. "Deus Ex Machina": 72 hours since the incident. Supplies have run out, Ada's conditions have worsened and Teo is breaking. All hope is lost. Right when you were about to turn into monster food, a mysterious woman saves you out of nowhere. She's not happy to see you.

  3. "Aftermath": it's been a week since the incident. For some reason she doesn't want or care to explain, Yelena decided to stick around to help your party. You're in the middle of a brutal session, she's going to beat up all three of you.

+

  1. Make your own scenario

The Silver Blades

Teo
creator: Odnar
